health_tips.title: Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups
health_tips.description: Sensitive individuals should reduce the intensity of their outdoor activities, especially if they experience symptoms like a cough or a sore throat.
health_tips.tag_line: The air quality is unhealthy for sensitive people.

health_tips.title: Very Unhealthy Air Quality
health_tips.description: Reduce strenuous activity outdoors and consider wearing a mask or a light cloth over your nose and mouth. Keep windows and doors closed to keep indoor air clean.
health_tips.tag_line: The air quality is reaching levels of high alert.
